aPrioriDNS.DNS.read_variable_in_chunks

aPrioriDNS.DNS.read_variable_in_chunks(file_path, chunk_size)

Generator to read a binary file in chunks.

Parameters:

file_pathstr

Path to the binary file.

chunk_sizeint

Number of elements to read per chunk.

Returns:

: np.ndarray

Array of data read from the file.
